heading: Opt Out of Cluster Tier Auto-Scaling
body:
To opt out of cluster auto-scaling (increasing the cluster tier),
when [Create a Cluster](create-new-cluster), navigate to the
**Cluster Tier** menu, and un-check the
**Cluster Tier Scaling** checkbox in the **Auto-scale**
section.

To opt out of cluster auto-scaling (decreasing the cluster tier),
when [Create a Cluster](create-new-cluster), navigate to
**Cluster Tier** menu, and un-check the
**Allow cluster to be scaled down** checkbox in the
**Auto-scale** section.
